div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 378px; height: 1px; padding-top: 347px; margin-left: 271px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Security Hardening & Rules:
• Common Rule Set (CRS): Protects against OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities
• Known Bad Inputs: Detects malicious payloads & vulnerability scanners
• SQL Injection (SQLi): Inspects query strings and bodies for SQLi patterns
• Amazon IP Reputation: Blocks requests from known bots/malicious hosts
• Rate Limiting: Blocks IPs exceeding 2,000 requests per 5 minutes
• IP Set Control: Explicit blocklist/allowlist configuration

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(230, 242, 255), rgb(22, 32, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 102, 204), rgb(86, 174, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 318px; height: 1px; padding-top: 347px; margin-left: 671px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Monitoring & Alarms:
• WAFBlockedRequestsAlarm: Triggers if overall WAF blocks > 100 reqs in 5m
• WAFRateLimitAlarm: Triggers if Rate Limiting blocks > 50 reqs in 5m
• WAF Logs: Complete request logging (including matched rule) retained for 90 days
